overallDecision: Readiness evidence only. No production sandbox certification and no non-JS counted promotion.

rows.promotionStatus: counted baseline preserved; sandbox not certified
rows.proves: Counted JS/TS runtime path still executes and rejects invalid output.
rows.strongerClaimGaps: Production-owned isolation, operational abuse model, deployment proof, external review.

rows.doesNotProve: Counted eligibility or production sandbox certification.
rows.proves: Python non-counted exhibition beta path remains isolated by policy and validation.
rows.strongerClaimGaps: Production sandbox, package policy, deterministic operational proof, no-fallback live drills.

rows.doesNotProve: Production sandbox certification or counted Rust play.
rows.proves: Rust immutable WASM/WASI Preview 1 evidence where local tools pass.
rows.strongerClaimGaps: Operational sandbox proof, deployment controls, direct/WIT migration proof, counted governance.

rows.doesNotProve: Production sandbox certification or counted Zig play.
rows.proves: Zig immutable WASM/WASI Preview 1 evidence where local tools pass.
rows.strongerClaimGaps: Operational sandbox proof, parity, deployment controls, direct/WIT migration proof, counted governance.

rows.promotionStatus: active ABI remains Preview 1 stdin/stdout JSON
rows.proves: Preview 1 JSON metadata fails closed on ABI mismatch.
rows.strongerClaimGaps: Direct export or WIT promotion evidence, rollback, replay compatibility, production operations.

rows.doesNotProve: Executable parity, memory safety, validation, or caps.
rows.strongerClaimGaps: Memory ownership, buffers, caps, schema, privacy, Rust/Zig parity, rollback.

rows.doesNotProve: Executable component parity or production readiness.
rows.proves: Minimal WIT world shape is documented as a candidate.
rows.strongerClaimGaps: Bindings, Wasmtime component host, caps, validation, privacy, parity, rollback.
